import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common'; import { RouterLink } from '@angular/router'; @Component({ selector: 'app-about', standalone: true, imports: [CommonModule, RouterLink], templateUrl: './about.component.html', styleUrls: ['./about.component.scss'] }) export class AboutComponent {}

About Peepal Export

Leading the way in global import and export solutions

Our Story

Peepal Export has been a trusted name in the import-export business for over a decade. We specialize in connecting businesses globally, offering a wide range of products including agricultural goods, automobiles, textiles, and industrial equipment.

Our mission is to facilitate seamless international trade by providing reliable logistics, quality assurance, and excellent customer service. We pride ourselves on our extensive network of suppliers and buyers across multiple countries.

Our Core Values

Integrity

We conduct all our business with honesty and transparency

Quality

We ensure only the best products reach our customers

Reliability

We deliver on our promises, every single time

Innovation

We continuously improve our processes and services

Our Expertise

Agricultural Products

Fresh produce, grains, spices, and specialty crops

Automobiles

Used and new vehicles, spare parts, and accessories

Textiles & Garments

Fabrics, clothing, and textile raw materials

Industrial Goods

Machinery, equipment, and industrial components

10+

Years of Experience

50+

Countries Served

1000+

Happy Clients

100%

Satisfaction Rate

Ready to Do Business With Us?

Contact us today to discuss your import or export needs
